name: audit-write
description: Hub + 9 sub-skills to draft, rewrite, audit, and review (writing review + simulated peer review) empirical audit-research papers for the accounting top-5 (JAE/JAR/TAR/CAR/RAST), in a calibrated register reverse-engineered from a named corpus. Corpus-grounded, integrity-gated, de-personalized for public reuse.
